headline: The documentation shift you're missing
primary_text:
Over 10,000 clinicians are finishing their notes in under 10 minutes. What do they know that you don't?

They're using AI that actually understands therapy. JotPsych turns your session recordings into compliant progress notes while you move on to your next client — or go home on time.

No more typing until 8pm. No more weekend catch-up. Just record your session, and get back notes that sound like you wrote them.

Join the clinicians who've reclaimed 2 hours of their day. See how JotPsych works.
